requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (BOS / IEC 60335-2-24; Kigali / Montreal Protocol)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（BOS/IEC 60335-2-24；基加利/蒙特利尔议定书）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（BOS/IEC 60335-2-24；基加利/蒙特婁議定書）

summary.en: Botswana does not operate an EU-style F-Gas Regulation with its own quota/phase-down enforcement. Refrigerant control for household appliances runs mainly through (a) the safety standard the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) adopts — BOS / IEC 60335-2-24, whose Annex AA sets flammable-refrigerant charge limits, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements for R-600a (isobutane, classified A3 lower-flammability, GWP approximately 3); and (b) Botswana's obligations under the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment for the HFC phase-down, administered nationally rather than via an EU-type product prohibition list. For R-600a refrigerators the requirement is essentially: comply with IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA charge/flammability limits, and document the refrigerant designation and charge weight (grams) on the rating plate and in the instructions.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳不实施带自身配额/削减执行的欧盟式氟气体法规。家用器具的制冷剂管控主要通过：（a）博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）采用的安全标准——BOS/IEC 60335-2-24，其附件AA为R-600a（异丁烷，归类A3低可燃性，GWP约3）规定可燃制冷剂充注量限值、通风及点火源要求；（b）博茨瓦纳在《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》下的HFC削减义务，按国家层面而非欧盟式产品禁令清单管理。对R-600a电冰箱而言，要求基本为：符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA充注量/可燃性限值，并在铭牌及说明书中记录制冷剂名称及充注量（克）。
summary.zht: 波札那不實施帶自身配額/削減執行的歐盟式氟氣體法規。家用器具的製冷劑管控主要通過：（a）波札那標準局（BOBS）採用的安全標準——BOS/IEC 60335-2-24，其附件AA為R-600a（異丁烷，歸類A3低可燃性，GWP約3）規定可燃製冷劑充注量限值、通風及點火源要求；（b）波札那在《蒙特婁議定書》及其《基加利修正案》下的HFC削減義務，按國家層面而非歐盟式產品禁令清單管理。對R-600a電冰箱而言，要求基本為：符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA充注量/可燃性限值，並在銘牌及說明書中記錄製冷劑名稱及充注量（克）。

standards_or_laws: BOS / IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — HFC phase-down obligations administered nationally by Botswana (no EU-style F-Gas product prohibition list)

summary.en: China addresses household-appliance flammable-refrigerant safety within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability/charge provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, read with GB 9237 (refrigerating-system safety, aligned with ISO 5149). China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE), on its own national schedule. Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Botswana's BOS adopt IEC 60335-2-24, the R-600a charge/flammability engineering base is essentially shared; Chinese R-600a refrigerators are generally well-positioned for the refrigerant aspect of the Botswana market.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014内处理家用器具可燃制冷剂安全，该标准纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性/充注量规定，须与GB 9237（制冷系统安全，参照ISO 5149）结合使用。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）按自身国家时间表执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国GB 4706.13与博茨瓦纳BOS均采用IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量/可燃性工程基础基本共通；使用R-600a的中国电冰箱在博茨瓦纳市场制冷剂方面一般具备良好条件。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014內處理家用器具可燃製冷劑安全，該標準納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性/充注量規定，須與GB 9237（製冷系統安全，參照ISO 5149）結合使用。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）按自身國家時間表執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國GB 4706.13與波札那BOS均採用IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量/可燃性工程基礎基本共通；使用R-600a的中國電冰箱在波札那市場製冷劑方面一般具備良好條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a refrigerators the gap is small and mostly documentary, because Botswana's BOS adoption and China's GB 4706.13 both descend from IEC 60335-2-24: (1) Charge/flammability evidence — confirm the R-600a charge meets the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits as adopted by BOS; Chinese CCC test data on the IEC base is largely reusable but should be presented within the BOBS conformity / import-inspection route; (2) Documentation — the rating plate and instructions must state refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams, with flammability safety precautions, in English; (3) HFC models — Botswana does NOT publish an EU-style F-Gas product-prohibition list, but any HFC-based models (e.g. R-134a) sit under Botswana's national Kigali/Montreal phase-down obligations, so HFC supply may tighten over time; R-600a avoids this exposure. There is no EU-type F-Gas certification of service technicians triggered at household charge levels.
gap.zh: 对R-600a电冰箱而言差距较小且多属文件性，因为博茨瓦纳BOS采用版本与中国GB 4706.13均源自IEC 60335-2-24：（1）充注量/可燃性证据——确认R-600a充注量符合BOS采用的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；基于IEC基准的中国CCC检测数据大体可复用，但应在BOBS合格评定/进口检验途径内提交；（2）文件——铭牌及说明书须以英语载明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克），并附可燃性安全注意事项；（3）HFC型号——博茨瓦纳不发布欧盟式氟气体产品禁令清单，但任何含HFC型号（如R-134a）受博茨瓦纳国家基加利/蒙特利尔削减义务约束，故HFC供应可能随时间收紧；R-600a可规避此风险。在家用充注量水平下不触发欧盟式氟气体技术人员资质。
gap.zht: 對R-600a電冰箱而言差距較小且多屬文件性，因為波札那BOS採用版本與中國GB 4706.13均源自IEC 60335-2-24：（1）充注量/可燃性證據——確認R-600a充注量符合BOS採用的IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；基於IEC基準的中國CCC檢測數據大體可複用，但應在BOBS合格評定/進口檢驗途徑內提交；（2）文件——銘牌及說明書須以英語載明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克），並附可燃性安全注意事項；（3）HFC型號——波札那不發布歐盟式氟氣體產品禁令清單，但任何含HFC型號（如R-134a）受波札那國家基加利/蒙特婁削減義務約束，故HFC供應可能隨時間收緊；R-600a可規避此風險。在家用充注量水平下不觸發歐盟式氟氣體技術人員資質。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via BOS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a charge/flammability limits); HFC phase-down via national Montreal Protocol / Kigali obligations — no EU-style F-Gas product-prohibition list
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Botswana: BOS adopts IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA charge/flammability limits, the same IEC base as China's GB 4706.13, so Chinese R-600a test data is largely reusable. The main work is documentary — declare refrigerant type and charge weight in grams (English) and present evidence within the BOBS conformity / import-inspection route. Botswana has no EU-style F-Gas product-prohibition list; HFC models instead sit under national Montreal/Kigali phase-down obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在博茨瓦纳条件良好：BOS采用IEC 60335-2-24附件AA充注量/可燃性限值，与中国GB 4706.13同源，故中国R-600a检测数据大体可复用。主要工作属文件性——以英语声明制冷剂类型及充注量（克），并在BOBS合格评定/进口检验途径内提交证据。博茨瓦纳无欧盟式氟气体产品禁令清单；含HFC型号改受国家蒙特利尔/基加利削减义务约束。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在波札那條件良好：BOS採用IEC 60335-2-24附件AA充注量/可燃性限值，與中國GB 4706.13同源，故中國R-600a檢測數據大體可複用。主要工作屬文件性——以英語聲明製冷劑類型及充注量（克），並在BOBS合格評定/進口檢驗途徑內提交證據。波札那無歐盟式氟氣體產品禁令清單；含HFC型號改受國家蒙特婁/基加利削減義務約束。
